title: Agent Definition
description: Validates agent configuration files ([name].agent.ts or [name].agent.yml) that define how an agent is spawned, connected, and what it can do.

id.description: Unique identifier for this agent, used in orchestrator routing rules and domain agent lists.

type.description: Agent execution type. 'local' spawns a CLI process, 'mcp' connects via Model Context Protocol, 'remote' calls an HTTP/WebSocket endpoint.

command.description: CLI command to execute for local agents (e.g., 'claude', 'pi', 'gh copilot'). Required when type is 'local'.

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the agent process.

env.description: Environment variables to set when spawning the agent process.

additionalProperties.description: Environment variable value. Use 'age:...' prefix to reference encrypted values.

capabilities.description: List of capability identifiers this agent provides (e.g., 'code-generation', 'web-search', 'file-edit').

cost.description: Relative cost tier for using this agent. Used by the cost-optimized orchestration strategy.
